SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaIntro.raw_text: 给你看看我从馆主亚当那里\n学到的超凡的技术！$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaIntro.display_text:
给你看看我从馆主亚当那里
学到的超凡的技术！

encoding.hex: 0B 0D 0F B9 08 95 0D 98 3B 0E B0 02 EF B0 B0 FF

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaPostBa.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaPostBa.raw_text: 看看踩碎所有地板后\n会发生什么吧。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaPostBa.display_text:
看看踩碎所有地板后
会发生什么吧。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyIntro.raw_text: 你一路到这儿来，\n但却不可能见到亚当，\p因为你会输给我！$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyIntro.display_text:
你一路到这儿来，
但却不可能见到亚当，

因为你会输给我！

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyDefeat.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyDefeat
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyDefeat.raw_text: 你真强！\n我被你可爱的外表骗过了！$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyDefeat.display_text:
你真强！
我被你可爱的外表骗过了！

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyPostBa.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyPostBa.raw_text: 你也许能够躲过\n被亚当一击打倒的命运。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyPostBa.display_text:
你也许能够躲过
被亚当一击打倒的命运。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneIntro.raw_text: 亚当对战时的\n样子……\p我被那令人心醉的美丽吸引，\n才决定成为训练家。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneIntro.display_text:
亚当对战时的
样子……

我被那令人心醉的美丽吸引，
才决定成为训练家。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneDefeat.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneDefeat
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneDefeat.raw_text: 你的对战比我\n更加美丽……$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphneDefeat.display_text:
你的对战比我
更加美丽……

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphnePostBa.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphnePostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphnePostBa.raw_text: 你的对战\n非常优雅。\p啊……跟宝可梦在一起\n真幸运。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphnePostBa.display_text:
你的对战
非常优雅。

啊……跟宝可梦在一起
真幸运。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConnieIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConnieIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConnieIntro.raw_text: 让我告诉你\n对战的严酷吧。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConnieIntro.display_text:
让我告诉你
对战的严酷吧。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConniePostBa.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConniePostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConniePostBa.raw_text: 告诉你一件事吧。\p如果你想走到亚当那儿，\n就得在每块地板上走过一次。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConniePostBa.display_text:
告诉你一件事吧。

如果你想走到亚当那儿，
就得在每块地板上走过一次。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetIntro.raw_text: 丰缘地区最高水平的\n宝可梦道馆……\p就是琉璃市道馆。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetIntro.display_text:
丰缘地区最高水平的
宝可梦道馆……

就是琉璃市道馆。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetPostB.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetPostB.raw_text: 比起成为强大的道馆的一员，\n我想在其他地方训练会\l让你变得更强。\l但无论如何，那都更有趣一些。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetPostB.display_text:
比起成为强大的道馆的一员，
我想在其他地方训练会
让你变得更强。
但无论如何，那都更有趣一些。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaIntro.raw_text: 我和亚当一起\n训练宝可梦，\p别以为你能轻易打倒我。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaIntro.display_text:
我和亚当一起
训练宝可梦，

别以为你能轻易打倒我。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaPostBa.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaPostBa.raw_text: 看来你有潜力，\n为何不和我们一起训练呢？$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaPostBa.display_text:
看来你有潜力，
为何不和我们一起训练呢？

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyIntro.raw_text: 优雅地滑过冰面，\n道路却没有交叉……\p能做到这一点的训练家\n才拥有最高雅的美丽！$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyIntro.display_text:
优雅地滑过冰面，
道路却没有交叉……

能做到这一点的训练家
才拥有最高雅的美丽！

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyPostB.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyPostB.raw_text: 很明显，\n一个训练家有多强\l与年龄并无关系。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyPostB.display_text:
很明显，
一个训练家有多强
与年龄并无关系。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyIntro.raw_text: 当我和宝可梦在一起时，\n时光飞逝得连说声“呀”都来不及！$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyIntro.display_text:
当我和宝可梦在一起时，
时光飞逝得连说声“呀”都来不及！

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyPostB.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyPostB.raw_text: 真希望我能在说“呀”之前\n就忘记这场注定的失败！$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyPostB.display_text:
真希望我能在说“呀”之前
就忘记这场注定的失败！

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaIntro.raw_text: 我的稀有宝可梦\n也会和我一起战斗。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaIntro.display_text:
我的稀有宝可梦
也会和我一起战斗。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaDefeat.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaDefeat
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaDefeat.raw_text: 哎呀！你仔细看过\n我的宝可梦了吗？$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaDefeat.display_text:
哎呀！你仔细看过
我的宝可梦了吗？

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaPostBa.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaPostBa.raw_text: 我来到这道馆只因\n亚当会欣赏我亲爱的宝可梦。\p啊，如果我还年轻的时候\n就遇到了亚当多好……$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaPostBa.display_text:
我来到这道馆只因
亚当会欣赏我亲爱的宝可梦。

啊，如果我还年轻的时候
就遇到了亚当多好……

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaIntro.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaIntro
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaIntro.raw_text: 嘻嘻……\n你那严肃的面孔真迷人。$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaIntro.display_text:
嘻嘻……
你那严肃的面孔真迷人。

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaDefea.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaDefeat
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaDefea.display_text:
呀，天啊，
我太小看你了。

encoding.hex: 0E A6 3B 0C ED 01 00 3B FE 0D 98 0C AC 0E 2C 07 C2 09 D9 08 9E 37 FF

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaPostB.label: SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaPostBattle
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaPostB.raw_text: 你根本碰不到亚当分毫，\n嘻嘻，我肯定……$
SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaPostB.display_text:
你根本碰不到亚当分毫，
嘻嘻，我肯定……
